response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive fullstack experience across 15+ years, with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes), aligning well with the primary stack. His recent roles in AI-agent infrastructure and direct mail automation demonstrate problem-solving and architectural skills. However, his primary experience leans toward backend and general fullstack work, with less focus on Nest.js and Vitest specifically.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack development with strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise
Proven ability to design scalable systems (e.g., Geo-Data platform on Kubernetes)
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest (primary stack requirements)
Recent roles shifted toward AI-agent work, potentially reducing alignment with core enterprise tooling needs
